---
title: "COVID LMR — Analysis (Results Section 3: Sample Size)"
output: html_document
---

# Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# ---- Paths ----
in_dir    <- "../data/final"
plots_dir <- "../plots"
if (!dir.exists(plots_dir)) dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- Load data (if not already in session from 03_results_s1s2.Rmd) ----
if (!exists("study_table")) {
  rdata_in <- list.files(in_dir, pattern = "^covid_lmr_clean7_\\d{8}\\.RData$", full.names = TRUE)
  stopifnot(length(rdata_in) >= 1)
  rdata_in <- rdata_in[which.max(file.info(rdata_in)$mtime)]
  load(rdata_in)

  clean_id <- function(x) str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
  parse_dmy_safe <- function(x) {
    x <- as.character(x)
    x[x %in% c("", "na", "n/a", "unknown", "-99")] <- NA
    suppressWarnings(dmy(x))
  }
  study_table  <- study_table  %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
  pharma_table <- pharma_table %>% mutate(st_reg_id = clean_id(st_reg_id), reg_date = parse_dmy_safe(st_reg_date))
}

# ---- Colour palette ----
drug_cat_colors <- c(
  "Antimalarials"                = "mistyrose4",
  "Antivirals (repurposed)"      = "deepskyblue4",
  "Antivirals (direct-acting)"   = "deepskyblue3",
  "Corticosteroids"              = "#F58518",
  "Immunomodulators"             = "indianred3",
  "Antibody Therapies"           = "lightcoral",
  "Anticoagulants"               = "palegreen4",
  "Antibiotics / Antiparasitics" = "pink4",
  "Anti-inflammatories"          = "lightgoldenrod",
  "Metabolic agents"             = "#9D755D",
  "Supportive Care"              = "#D3D3D3",
  "Other/Unspecified"            = "#BEBEBE"
)

# ---- Themes (consistent with 03_results_s1s2.Rmd) ----

theme_timeseries <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text            = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = base_size, color = "#666666"),
      axis.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text       = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "#444444"),
      axis.ticks      = element_line(color = "#444444", linewidth = 0.25),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E1E5E9", linewidth = 0.5),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 12, 12, 12),
      legend.position    = "bottom"
    )
}

theme_bar <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      text            = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 2, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = base_size, hjust = 0, margin = margin(b = 6), color = "#666666"),
      axis.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text       = element_text(size = base_size - 1, color = "#444444"),
      axis.ticks      = element_line(color = "#444444", linewidth = 0.25),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.title       = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.text        = element_text(size = base_size - 2),
      legend.key.size    = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 12, 12, 12)
    )
}
```

# Section 3 — Sample size distribution and trends

## Data preparation

```{r cohort_ss, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
cohort <- study_table

cohort_ss <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
    st_sample_n = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(st_sample)),
    reg_date    = as.Date(reg_date),
    reg_qdate   = floor_date(reg_date, "quarter"),
    time_window = paste0("Q", quarter(reg_qdate), " ", year(reg_qdate)),
    half_year   = case_when(
      is.na(reg_date)        ~ NA_character_,
      month(reg_date) <= 6   ~ paste0("H1 ", year(reg_date)),
      TRUE                   ~ paste0("H2 ", year(reg_date))
    )
  )

# Factor levels in chronological order
quarter_levels <- cohort_ss %>%
  distinct(reg_qdate, time_window) %>%
  arrange(reg_qdate) %>%
  pull(time_window)

half_levels <- cohort_ss %>%
  distinct(reg_qdate, half_year) %>%
  arrange(reg_qdate) %>%
  pull(half_year) %>%
  unique()

cohort_ss <- cohort_ss %>%
  mutate(
    time_window = factor(time_window, levels = quarter_levels),
    half_year   = factor(half_year,   levels = half_levels)
  )

cohort_ss %>%
  summarise(
    n_studies          = n_distinct(st_reg_id),
    pct_sample_missing = scales::percent(mean(is.na(st_sample_n)), accuracy = 0.1)
  )
```

## Figure 6A — Overall sample size distribution

```{r fig6a, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fig6_overall <- cohort_ss %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample_n)) %>%
  select(st_reg_id, st_sample_n, reg_date, time_window)

fig6a_stats <- fig6_overall %>%
  summarise(
    n_studies  = n_distinct(st_reg_id),
    median_ss  = median(st_sample_n),
    q1         = quantile(st_sample_n, 0.25),
    q3         = quantile(st_sample_n, 0.75),
    pct_under100 = scales::percent(mean(st_sample_n < 100), accuracy = 0.1)
  )

fig6a_stats
```

## Figure 6B — Sample size distribution by half-year

```{r fig6b, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fig6_by_time <- cohort_ss %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample_n), time_window != "QNA NA") %>%
  select(st_reg_id, st_sample_n, time_window, half_year)

fig6_stats <- cohort_ss %>%
  filter(time_window != "QNA NA") %>%
  group_by(half_year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_studies      = n_distinct(st_reg_id),
    n_with_sample  = sum(!is.na(st_sample_n)),
    median         = median(st_sample_n, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1             = quantile(st_sample_n, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3             = quantile(st_sample_n, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fig6_stats

p6b <- ggplot(fig6_by_time, aes(x = half_year, y = st_sample_n)) +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "l", linewidth = 0.4, color = "#999999") +
  geom_violin(fill = "#f0f8ff", alpha = 0.6, color = "white", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.85) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#1f77b4", alpha = 0.7, width = 0.55,
               outlier.color = "#ff7f00", outlier.alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1.1) +
  geom_text(data = fig6_stats, aes(x = half_year, y = q1,     label = comma(round(q1))),
            nudge_x = -0.15, nudge_y = -0.1, size = 3, color = "#2E86C1", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = fig6_stats, aes(x = half_year, y = q3,     label = comma(round(q3))),
            nudge_x =  0.20, nudge_y =  0.08, size = 3, color = "#2E86C1", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = fig6_stats, aes(x = half_year, y = median, label = comma(round(median))),
            nudge_x =  0,    nudge_y =  0.1,  size = 3, color = "#FFFFFF",  fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_log10(
    breaks = c(10, 50, 100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 50000),
    labels = scales::comma_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(add = c(0.3, 0.5))) +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 6B. Planned sample size by half-year",
    subtitle = "Violin = density; Q1/Median/Q3 labelled; log10 scale",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Planned sample size (log10)"
  ) +
  theme_timeseries(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 9),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 9),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E1E5E9", linewidth = 0.6),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "#666666", face = "italic"),
    plot.title         = element_text(margin = margin(b = 10))
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig6b_sample_size_by_halfyear.png"), p6b, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p6b
```

## Figure 6C — Sample size by intervention category and phase

```{r fig6c, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Build study-drug table (all categories, not filtered, so Supportive Care is included)
cohort_ids <- cohort %>% distinct(st_reg_id)

pharma_in_cohort <- pharma_table %>%
  filter(drug_std != "azd1222") %>%
  semi_join(cohort_ids, by = "st_reg_id")

study_drug_all <- pharma_in_cohort %>%
  filter(!is.na(drug_std), drug_std != "") %>%
  distinct(st_reg_id, drug_std, display_group)

fig6c_data <- cohort_ss %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample_n)) %>%
  mutate(phase = case_when(
    year(reg_date) <= 2022 ~ "Pandemic (2020–2022)",
    TRUE                   ~ "Endemic (2023–2025)"
  )) %>%
  inner_join(study_drug_all %>% distinct(st_reg_id, display_group), by = "st_reg_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_group), display_group != "Other/Unspecified") %>%
  group_by(display_group, phase) %>%
  mutate(n_in_group = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

fig6c_counts <- fig6c_data %>%
  group_by(display_group, phase) %>%
  summarise(n_trials = n_distinct(st_reg_id), .groups = "drop")

p6c <- ggplot(fig6c_data,
       aes(x = st_sample_n, y = display_group, fill = phase, colour = phase)) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dotted", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = 105, y = "Supportive Care",
           label = "N = 100", hjust = 0, colour = "red", size = 2.8) +

  geom_boxplot(
    data     = ~filter(., n_in_group >= 10),
    aes(fill = phase),
    position      = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    width         = 0.55,
    outlier.size  = 0.5,
    outlier.alpha = 0.3,
    linewidth     = 0.4,
    alpha         = 0.85
  ) +

  stat_summary(
    aes(fill = phase),
    fun      = median,
    geom     = "point",
    shape    = 21,
    size     = 2.5,
    colour   = "grey20",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = fig6c_counts,
    aes(x = 50000, y = display_group, label = paste0("n=", n_trials), colour = phase),
    position    = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    hjust       = 1, size = 2.4,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +

  geom_jitter(
    data   = ~filter(., n_in_group < 10),
    aes(colour = phase),
    width  = 0, height = 0.15,
    size   = 2, alpha  = 0.7
  ) +

  scale_y_discrete() +
  scale_x_log10(
    breaks = c(10, 50, 100, 500, 1000, 5000, 50000),
    labels = c("10", "50", "100", "500", "1k", "5k", "50k"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Pandemic (2020–2022)" = "#0077BB", "Endemic (2023–2025)" = "#EE7733"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Pandemic (2020–2022)" = "#0077BB", "Endemic (2023–2025)" = "#EE7733"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 6C. Planned sample size by intervention category and phase",
    subtitle = "Log scale  |  Red line = N 100  |  Dot = median  |  Box = IQR",
    x        = "Planned sample size (log scale)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bar(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.justification = "left",
    panel.grid.major.y   = element_line(colour = "grey92", linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.text.y          = element_text(size = 9)
  )

ggsave(file.path(plots_dir, "fig6c_sample_size_by_category_phase.png"), p6c, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
p6c
```
